title: Bedrock Paradise
description: Bedrock Paradise is a gardening mod inspired by Viva Piñata. Capture piñatas, build a garden, grow their favorite plants, and care for them.
body:
![Bedrock Paradise Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a326c0f879d220346acf6e68405414f48978cb1.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4nvM06B0Qv4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Bedrock Paradise is a Fabric mod inspired by Viva Piñata, focused on gardening, creature care, and building a peaceful garden.
Capture piñatas, invite them to live in your garden, grow crops and flowers they love, and learn about each species through an in-game journal.

## Note
***Bedrock Paradise is still in active development. Features, mechanics, and data formats may change between updates.
Not recommended for long-term or important worlds yet, as future updates may require world resets or cause incompatibilities.***

If you encounter bugs or have feedback, you can join the Discord server.

## Installation
- Requires the [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) for 1.21 of Minecraft.
- Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
- Requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) 4.5.8 or greater.
- Requires [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) 1.21-89 or greater

## Features

- Create a garden using a Garden Board.
- Explore the world to find different piñata species.
- Capture piñatas using traps and relocate them to your garden.
- Grow crops and flowers that match each species’ preferences.
- Fulfill their needs to turn them into permanent garden residents.
- Unlock information and mechanics through an in-game journal.
- Current version adds 10 piñata species.

![Bunnycomb in a plains biome staring to its left, some grass, buttercup and daisy flowers are around the Bunnycomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/774d99f5685bddfc9c3dc74d449c129528d2b9c3.png)
![Various piñatas in a field of buttercups inside a garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b96a7621e287960d4994dad8fa0a3f994d50c6.png)
![Carrot, Chili and Turnip crops surrounded by a fence.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea52931a37cbc156ac323eeb6ae5cc09a146297d.jpeg)

## What's Planned

- More piñatas, plants and decorations.
- Romancing piñatas - breed them to create eggs.
- Appear Requirements - attract piñatas by meeting specific garden conditions.
- Datapack support for creating custom piñatas
- Custom journal UI to replace Patchouli dependency.

## License

Viva Piñata © Microsoft Corporation. Bedrock Paradise was created under Microsoft's "Game Content Usage Rules" using assets from Viva Piñata, and it is not endorsed by or affiliated with Microsoft.
